name: AntiAbuse
description: Automatically watches message rate, command spam, mention spam, all-caps messages and link spam, with optional ignored channels/categories. Escalates to warnings, timed timeouts, and optional guild lockdown.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: AntiAbuse loaded. Use `[p]antiabuse` to inspect settings and `[p]antiabuse on|off` to control enforcement.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores anti-abuse warning counts and timestamps per guild member and member-specific strike counters. It also stores guild-level configuration values and lockdown state metadata.
